title: Trimming Shop 6.5ft/2m Red Chunky Christmas Tinsel Garland Shiny Metallic Fine Foil Twist Xmas Tree Garland for Festive Party, Holiday Celebration, Indoor & Outdoor Hanging Decorations
features: 𝐄𝐲𝐞-𝐂𝐚𝐭𝐜𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐂𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬: Select from a variety of tinsel garland colours including Green, Gold, Silver, Red, Rose Pink, Blue, Purple, White, Silver White, and Rainbow or opt for a multi-colour option.

𝐒𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐲 𝐂𝐡𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐦𝐚𝐬 𝐓𝐢𝐧𝐬𝐞𝐥 𝐆𝐚𝐫𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐝: Each of the 9 colour variations offers bright and vivid hues that align with traditional Christmas themes. These colours help create and amplify a festive atmosphere in your home and at parties.

𝐒𝐢𝐳𝐞: Each garland measures 9cm in width and 2m in length, providing ample length for a dazzling Christmas display. The garlands are plentiful, ensuring enough to adorn a Christmas tree and spread holiday cheer.
𝐌𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐚𝐥: Crafted from high-quality metal wire and plastic, the tinsel is chunky, soft, and free from harmful odours. The environmentally friendly design makes these garlands easy to store and reuse.

𝐈𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐔𝐬𝐞: Versatile in application, the tinsel can be used to decorate windows, doors, ceilings, stairs, and more. Ideal for adding a touch of elegance to your Christmas party decorations. The tinsel's delicate design and bright colours make it a perfect choice for festive adornments.
description: Product Description What are the dimensions of each tinsel garland? Each garland measures 9cm in width and 2 metres in length, providing plenty of material for decorating Christmas trees, windows, staircases, and more. What material is the tinsel made from? The tinsel is crafted from high-quality metal wire and plastic, making it chunky, soft, durable, and free from harmful odours. It is safe to use around the home and suitable for indoor decorations. Can the tinsel be reused for future Christmases? Yes! The garlands are made from environmentally friendly, durable materials, allowing them to be easily stored and reused year after year. Is the tinsel suitable for decorating areas other than the Christmas tree? Absolutely. These versatile garlands can be used on windows, doors, ceilings, stair railings, fireplaces, tabletops, and anywhere you want to add festive charm. Is the tinsel thick enough to provide full coverage on a Christmas tree? Yes, the tinsel is designed to be chunky and full, ensuring bright, vivid coverage that enhances the look of any Christmas tree or decorative display.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Festive Decorative Garland, Hanging Decoration, Indoor, Outdoor
